title: Transformers Remember First, Forget Last: Dual-Process Interference in LLMs
what_happened: arXiv:2603.00270v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: When large language models encounter conflicting information in context, which memories survive -- early or recent? We adapt classical interference paradigms from cognitive psychology to answer this question, testing 39 LLMs across diverse architectures and scales. Every model shows the same pattern
primary_risk: Risk of overfitting conclusions to narrow benchmarks.
primary_opportunity: Practical improvements when layered onto existing AI workflows.
technical_angle: Signals incremental evolution rather than a paradigm shift in current AI systems.

title: PRX Part 3 — Training a Text-to-Image Model in 24h!
what_happened: Hugging Face Blog announced 'PRX Part 3 — Training a Text-to-Image Model in 24h!', highlighting new developments relevant to AI researchers and practitioners.
primary_risk: Unclear production readiness despite promising early results.
primary_opportunity: Selective adoption in niche use cases with clear ROI.
technical_angle: Adds empirical validation to approaches already used in production AI stacks.

title: Google's fastest and cheapest model Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite got smarter but also tripled the price
what_happened: Google Deepmind has released a preview of Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite, the fastest and cheapest model in the Gemini 3 series. It's significantly more capable than its predecessor, but output costs have more than tripled. The article Google's fastest and cheapest model Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite got smarter but also tripled the price appeared first on The
primary_risk: Unclear production readiness despite promising early results.

title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.3 Instant for smoother everyday conversations and better search
what_happened: OpenAI has released GPT-5.3 Instant. The model is designed to respond more naturally and hallucinate less, especially when using web search. The article OpenAI releases GPT-5.3 Instant for smoother everyday conversations and better search appeared first on The Decoder.
primary_risk: Unclear production readiness despite promising early results.
primary_opportunity: Practical improvements when layered onto existing AI workflows.

title: Trailer: The Shape of Things to Come
what_happened: Microsoft research lead Doug Burger introduces his new podcast series, "The Shape of Things to Come", an exploration into the fundamental truths about AI and how the technology will reshape the future. The post Trailer: The Shape of Things to Come appeared first on Microsoft Research.
